log.context:
The API key test returned HTTP 403 error code 1010 for all three model names (grok-3-mini, grok-beta, grok-2). This is a Cloudflare error 1010 ("Access denied — The owner of this website has banned your access based on your browser's signature"), not an xAI authentication error.

Key findings:
- API key is present and 84 characters long
- All requests are being blocked at the network/Cloudflare layer before even reaching xAI's servers (HTTP 403, error code 1010)
- This is not an "invalid key" er...(truncated)
